expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly frames the scope as “Coverage Refinement for Donut-Chart Data Labels (Visibility, Density, Overlap)” and breaks coverage into sections “A) Label visibility outcomes”, “B) Density-driven outcomes”, and “C) Overlap-sensitive outcomes (collision resolution behavior)”, stating these dimensions must be “explicitly distinguished in coverage”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The document title is “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 4a Deliverable (Baseline)” and it repeatedly labels sections as “Phase 4a” (e.g., “Phase 4a — Coverage Refinement…”, “4a.1”, “4a.2”, “4a.6”), matching the configured primary phase under test: phase4a.
